description: Consolidate ingredients from the 'Recipes' sheet into a shopping list by aggregating duplicates and cross-referencing against the 'Pantry' sheet inventory. Populate the 'Shopping List' sheet with the calculated quantities of items that need to be purchased.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet with 5 recipes and a pantry inventory. Consolidate all ingredients from the recipes, sum up quantities for items that appear multiple times, subtract what you already have in the pantry, and create a shopping list showing only what you need to buy.
